arts.sum: Chelsea are currently flying high in the Premier League table as they sit second in the table, just seven points behind leaders Liverpool. Under Enzo...

arts.ttl: Is Gabriel fit to start for Arsenal vs Fulham? Injury latest and FPL update
arts.sum: Asked how he would rate his chances of featuring, Arteta admitted: "Until tomorrow's [Saturday's] training session it's very difficult to say." Just prior to his comments, there was a sizeable injury update on Gabriel with Sky Sports revealing neither he or Riccardo Calafiori were part of the group that trained outside at London Colney on Friday. Fantasy Premier League managers will likely be sweating over what to do with Arsenal's Gabriel Magalhaes ahead of Saturday's 1.30pm deadline for Game Week 15.

arts.ttl: Man United, Liverpool make contact to sign 24-year-old wide player on Arsenal and Chelsea radar
arts.sum: Bayern Munich defender Alphonso Davies has been linked with a move away from the German club as he nears the end of his current contract. The 24-year-old left-back will be a free agent at the end of the season and the likes of Manchester United and Liverpool are keen on him. However, Bayern Munich do […] The post Man United, Liverpool make contact to sign 24-year-old wide player on Arsenal and Chelsea radar appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal can profit from ‘WAR’ to sign €50m star
arts.sum: Arsenal ’s need for an attacking midfielder is an issue that Gunners boss Mikel Arteta is well aware of, yet an unexpected opening may be emerging for the Emirates side on this front. Indeed, the Gunners are more suited to Dembele than any other side by a considerable margin, particularly when only Premier League clubs are considered.

arts.ttl: Fulham boss Marco Silva reminds Arsenal of weakness ahead of Premier League clash
arts.sum: Fulham beat Arsenal last term - with their victory aided by set pieces - as they prepare to take on the Gunners who themselves have become masters of dead ball situations

arts.ttl: Gabriel and Calafiori start, Martinelli decision - Dream Arsenal XI vs Fulham - Tom Canton - football.london
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta said after the game that he hoped there was a chance they might return and therefore in this dream scenario hopefully that will indeed be the case. Dream Arsenal XI vs Fulham: Raya, Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Calafiori, Rice, Merino, Odegaard, Saka, Havertz, Trossard

arts.ttl: Club confident of landing 27-year-old Arsenal star as their statement signing
arts.sum: Brazilian club Palmeiras are keen on signing the Arsenal striker Gabriel Jesus. According to a report from Fichajes, the 27-year-old striker is a target for the Brazilian outfit and they are determined to make him their statement signing. They are confident of getting the deal done and they believe that the player’s emotional motivation to […] The post Club confident of landing 27-year-old Arsenal star as their statement signing appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Gabriel decision made as £200,000-a-week man drops out: Arsenal predicted starting XI v Fulham
arts.sum: The Gunners will be eager to keep the pressure on Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak to Arsenal early transfer verdict - £80m deal, Newcastle demand, Gabriel Jesus swap - Lee Wilmot - football.london
arts.sum: Transfers between Premier League clubs in January are unlikely, particularly for players of Isak's calibre, but could and should Arsenal make a move in the winter window? Half a season with Isak at Arsenal would set them up nicely for next year too and give the Gunners the platform to really go and claim the Premier League title.
